booflo_vest.title: Craft the Booflo Vest — made from Booflo Fur, grants 6× jump height in the End dimension

bolloom_farm.title: Build a Bolloom farm in the Poise Forest — Bolloom Buds grow on End Stone and yield Bolloom Fruit

subtitle.text: The Poise Forest is not just scenery. It is a resource biome. Farm it properly and it pays indefinitely.

description: CH.13 · ENDERGETIC ECONOMY
▸ The Poise Forest is not decoration.
It is a parallel resource system exclusive to the End.
The Booflo and Bolloom plants are its primary outputs.
Both can be farmed. Neither requires combat.
This is the End's version of a passive income biome.
◈ BOOFLO VEST
└ Craft: Booflo Fur (from Booflo kills) → Booflo Vest
└ Effect: grants 6× jump height while in the End dimension
└ This is your primary vertical mobility tool in End City towers
(replaces multiple Ender Pearl throws for floor traversal)
└ Stack with Elytra: Vest for vertical, Elytra for horizontal
└ Combines well with ISS Eldritch levitation spells
◈ BOLLOOM FARM
└ Bolloom Buds grow on End Stone in the Poise Forest
└ Bolloom Fruit: food source unique to the End dimension
└ Farm design: plant Bolloom Buds on flat End Stone platforms
near or within the Poise Forest biome boundary
└ Yield: passive food income for long End expeditions
(reduces hunger pressure during extended outer island sweeps)
└ Puff Bug Wings: secondary Endergetic material, used in crafting
◈ BOOFLO FUR FARMING
└ Booflo is passive — does not aggro
└ Farm: build enclosed pen in Poise Forest, pen Boflos
└ Kill cycle for fur (same as cow leather farming)
└ Fur uses: Booflo Vest, End-tier crafting material
└ Keep 2 Boflos alive for breeding if Endergetic supports it
▸ The Booflo grazed here when the civilizations arrived.
It grazed while they built the cities.
It is still grazing now.
It has never once cared about the portal.
That is the most End creature thing possible.
▶ Craft the Booflo Vest [check]
▶ Build a Bolloom farm [check]
▶ Collect 8 Booflo Fur
◇ The Booflo Vest jump boost is most useful
in End City tower floors — each floor is 4+ blocks tall.
With the Vest, you can skip floors entirely.
Combined with Elytra: the city becomes trivial to navigate.
